schedule.label: Day 1 — Exam Revision
schedule.daily_goal: Conduct a comprehensive review of all high-priority concepts and practice key problem types to solidify understanding before the exam.

warnings: Due to only 1 day until the exam and the rule to reserve the last 2 days for revision, no new topics could be scheduled. The entire available day (Day 1) is designated for revision.
A significant number of topics (20) with an estimated total of 35.0 hours could not be covered. Focus your revision on the most critical concepts you are already familiar with.
